segments.integrated_caption: The segment opens with a man, wearing a black polo shirt and a gray baseball cap, seated in a studio with blue lighting and tech gadgets, speaking directly to the camera with expressive hand gestures. He introduces his goal to show the top 10 most useful GPTs from the official GPT store, explaining in a clear, articulate male voice that it took him about a week and many credits to test over 100 different GPTs for this list. The scene transitions to a screen recording of the dark-themed ChatGPT GPTs interface, where the man demonstrates searching for 'gpt finder' and displays multiple results. He then shows a Google Sheets document titled 'GPT Directory Programming' by skillleap.ai, listing various GPTs with icons, categories, descriptions, and links, which he refers to as 'this entire document' and his 'knowledge base' containing top GPTs in different categories. The video cuts back to the man, who continues explaining his process of narrowing down from over 20,000 GPTs to the top 100 most useful. The screen recording returns, showing the 'GPT Finder' configuration page with uploaded PDF files under 'Knowledge' and a preview section with sample prompts, which he identifies as 'my knowledge base' and 'different categories' from the document. Throughout the screen recordings, the man’s face appears in a small circular overlay, maintaining visual continuity as he explains the features and benefits of his curated GPTs.
segments.visual_original_caption: The video opens with a man wearing a black polo shirt and a gray baseball cap, seated in front of a microphone in a studio setting with blue lighting and shelves displaying tech gadgets in the background. He speaks directly to the camera, gesturing with his hands as he introduces the topic. The scene transitions to a screen recording of the ChatGPT GPTs interface, where he demonstrates searching for 'gpt finder' and displays multiple results. He then shows a Google Sheets document titled 'GPT Directory Programming' by skillleap.ai, listing various GPTs with icons, categories, descriptions, and links. The video cuts back to the man, who continues explaining with expressive hand movements. The screen recording returns, showing the 'GPT Finder' configuration page with uploaded PDF files under 'Knowledge' and a preview section with sample prompts. Throughout, the man’s face appears in a small circular overlay during screen recordings, maintaining visual continuity. The environment remains consistent with professional studio lighting and a tech-focused backdrop.

audio_updated_entities.Man in Studio: A man with a clear, articulate male voice, wearing a black polo shirt and gray baseball cap, seated in front of a microphone, speaking directly to the camera with expressive hand gestures. He introduces the topic of useful GPTs, explains his process of testing over 100 GPTs, and identifies himself (or his company) as 'skillleap.ai' in relation to the 'GPT Finder' he created. He appears in both live shots and as a circular overlay during screen recordings.
audio_updated_entities.ChatGPT GPTs Interface: A dark-themed web interface where the man demonstrates searching for 'gpt finder' and displays multiple results, which he explains are part of his curated list of useful GPTs.
audio_updated_entities.Google Sheets Document: A spreadsheet titled 'GPT Directory Programming' by skillleap.ai, listing various GPTs with columns for GPT Name, Icon, Category, Description, and Link, displayed in a browser window. The man refers to this as 'this entire document' and his 'knowledge base,' containing the top GPTs in all kinds of different categories.
audio_updated_entities.GPT Finder Configuration Page: A ChatGPT interface showing the 'GPT Finder' setup with uploaded PDF files under 'Knowledge' and a 'Preview' section with sample prompts. The man explains that these PDFs are 'my knowledge base' and represent 'different categories' from the document he created.

segments.integrated_caption: The video opens with a screen recording of the GPT Finder Configuration Page, where the Man in Studio, visible in a circular overlay, speaks directly to the camera in an informative tone. He explains that the GPTs shown are hand-picked and tested for usefulness, referring to the interface as "GPT Finder." The scene then transitions to a 'DOC MAKER' title card with a stylized '10' logo, as the Man in Studio announces "Doc Maker" as the tenth item in an "official countdown." The video cuts to the ChatGPT GPTs Interface, where the Man in Studio continues his narration, explaining that searching for a GPT, like 'doc maker' (which the user types into the search bar), reveals its interaction count. He highlights 'Doc Maker' by aidocmaker.com, noting its "over 25,000 chats" as a significant usage indicator. Upon selection, the Doc Maker GPT Interface loads, introducing itself with a detailed breakdown of its capabilities: Document Creation, Presentations, Spreadsheets, and Data Analysis. The Man in Studio elaborates on the utility of this introductory section for GPT builders, explaining it as a way to clearly communicate the GPT's functions, which include creating PDFs, documents, and PowerPoints. The user then requests a presentation on 'Generative AI,' and the GPT quickly generates a modern slide deck, previewed in a new browser tab with slides titled 'Introduction to Generative AI' and 'How Do Generative AI Work?'. The Man in Studio, gesturing expressively, confirms he created a PowerPoint using the GPT, which provided a link to the generated content.
segments.visual_original_caption: The video begins with a screen recording of the GPT Finder Configuration Page, where the Man in Studio appears in a circular overlay in the top-right corner, speaking directly to the camera. The interface displays uploaded PDF files under 'Knowledge' and a 'Preview' section with sample prompts. The scene transitions to a title card reading 'DOC MAKER' with a stylized '10' logo. The video then cuts to the ChatGPT GPTs Interface, where the Man in Studio continues his narration as the user types 'doc maker' into the search bar. The search results show 'Doc Maker' by aidocmaker.com as the top result, highlighted with 25K+ interactions. The user selects it, and the interface loads the Doc Maker GPT, which introduces itself with a detailed breakdown of its capabilities: Document Creation, Presentations, Spreadsheets, and Data Analysis. The user then requests a presentation on 'Generative AI,' and the GPT generates a slide deck, which is previewed in a new browser tab. The presentation includes slides titled 'Introduction to Generative AI' and 'How Do Generative AI Work?' with clean, modern design elements. The Man in Studio gestures expressively throughout, emphasizing key points about the GPT's functionality.

The Man in Studio describes this GPT as a tool capable of creating PDFs, documents, and PowerPoints, emphasizing its utility for builders to clearly communicate its functions.
audio_updated_entities.Presentation Preview: A browser-based presentation editor displaying slides with titles like 'Introduction to Generative AI' and 'How Do Generative AI Work?', featuring a clean, modern design with blue and gray color accents. The Man in Studio confirms that this presentation was generated as a PowerPoint by the Doc Maker GPT, accessible via a provided link.

segments.integrated_caption: The video opens with a screen recording of a browser displaying a 'Applications of Generative AI' presentation, while the Man in Studio, speaking with a clear, informative male voice, appears in a circular overlay. He demonstrates the interface, explaining how prompts create editable documents that can be converted to audio or downloaded as a 'very basic PowerPoint' for a quick start. The scene then transitions to a live shot of the Man in Studio speaking directly to the camera, before cutting back to a screen recording of the ChatGPT GPTs Interface. Here, he guides the viewer to 'Super Describe', a GPT he explains is for uploading images to get the right prompt for DALL·E 3. He uploads a black-and-white architectural photo of an escalator, and the GPT generates a detailed textual description, which he highlights as a great way to get a matching prompt. The Man in Studio then navigates to 'Prompt Perfect', another GPT, briefly introducing it before the audio cuts off.
segments.visual_original_caption: The video begins with a screen recording of a presentation titled 'Applications of Generative AI' in a browser, with the Man in Studio visible in a circular overlay in the top-right corner. He interacts with the interface, clicking through options like 'Preview', 'Listen', and 'Download', before navigating to a new tab. The scene transitions to a live shot of the Man in Studio speaking directly to the camera in a studio setting with shelves and framed displays in the background. The video then cuts to a screen recording of the ChatGPT GPTs Interface, where the user searches for and selects 'Super Describe', a GPT for generating image prompts. The user uploads a black-and-white architectural photo of an escalator, and the GPT generates a detailed textual description of the image, which is displayed alongside the original. The user then searches for 'Prompt Perfect', another GPT, and views its description, which explains how it enhances user prompts for AI image generation. Throughout, the Man in Studio remains in the circular overlay, guiding the viewer through the process with expressive hand gestures and direct address.

audio_updated_entities.Super Describe GPT: A custom GPT within the ChatGPT GPTs Interface, identified by a red circular icon with a stylized 'S', designed to generate detailed image prompts from uploaded photos using DALL·E 3, as demonstrated by the Man in Studio uploading an architectural photo and receiving a detailed textual description.
audio_updated_entities.Prompt Perfect GPT: A custom GPT within the ChatGPT GPTs Interface, identified by a colorful circular icon with a stylized 'P', designed to enhance and refine user prompts for AI image generation tools like DALL·E, which the Man in Studio introduces as the next item on the list.

segments.integrated_caption: The minute begins with the Man in Studio, wearing a black polo shirt and gray baseball cap, speaking directly to the camera in a well-lit studio environment with shelves of tech equipment and framed blue displays in the background. He gestures with his right hand as he explains that for better responses from ChatGPT, prompts often need more details, context, and structure. The scene transitions to a screen recording of the dark-themed ChatGPT GPTs Interface, where the Man in Studio appears in a circular overlay in the top-left corner, continuing his narration. He demonstrates the 'Prompt Perfect' GPT, identified by its colorful 'P' icon, explaining that it enhances user prompts for AI tools like DALL·E by adding all the necessary elements to take them to the next level, making it a great tool for those new to prompting. He then introduces another DALL·E tool called 'Logo Creator', noting it has over 100,000 chats. The screen shifts to a search for 'logo creator' within the GPTs Interface, revealing a list of logo-related GPTs. The user selects the 'Logo Creator' GPT, identified by its blue 'L' icon, and the Man in Studio highlights how it walks users through a very step-by-step guide, asking easy, simple multiple-choice questions before creating the logo. The GPT asks for design preferences (Vibrant, Neutral, Serious), and the user selects 'B) Neutral'. The GPT then generates a grid of nine logo designs for 'Skill Leap AI' using a blue and gray color palette. The final screen displays these generated logos with a prompt asking for feedback, as the Man in Studio continues to narrate, expressing interest in the '16 different variations' it provided.
segments.visual_original_caption: The video begins with the Man in Studio speaking directly to the camera in a well-lit studio environment, gesturing with his right hand as he explains a concept. The background features shelves with tech equipment and framed blue displays, creating a professional atmosphere. The scene transitions to a screen recording of the ChatGPT GPTs Interface, where the Man in Studio appears in a circular overlay in the top-left corner, continuing his narration. He demonstrates the 'Prompt Perfect' GPT, showing its interface and explaining its function to enhance user prompts for AI tools like DALL·E. The screen then shifts to a search for 'logo creator' within the GPTs Interface, revealing a list of logo-related GPTs. The user selects 'Logo Creator' and initiates a conversation, where the GPT asks for design preferences (Vibrant, Neutral, Serious). The user selects 'B) Neutral', and the GPT generates a grid of nine logo designs for 'Skill Leap AI' using a blue and gray color palette. The final screen displays the generated logos with a prompt asking for feedback, while the Man in Studio continues to narrate the process.

audio_updated_entities.Logo Creator GPT: A custom GPT within the ChatGPT GPTs Interface, identified by a blue circular icon with a stylized 'L', described by the Man in Studio as a DALL·E tool that guides users through a step-by-step process with simple multiple-choice questions to generate logo designs based on user preferences and company details, capable of producing multiple variations like the 16 shown.

segments.integrated_caption: The minute opens with a screen recording of the ChatGPT GPTs Interface, displaying the Logo Creator GPT with nine distinct 'Skill Leap AI' logo designs in a blue and grey color palette, accompanied by a message asking for user feedback. A Man in Studio, wearing a black polo shirt and gray baseball cap, is heard speaking directly to the camera in a clear, explanatory voice, noting how the Logo Creator "gives me ton of ideas" and generally "got the text right," though he points out "a lot of typos" and that "Dolly is not quite good yet at making text." He advises users to "play around with more prompts" or ask for an icon-only logo to add text elsewhere. The scene briefly cuts to a live shot of the Man in Studio, seated in a dimly lit studio with blue ambient lighting and shelves of tech gadgets, gesturing expressively as he continues to speak. The video then returns to the screen recording, showing the user hovering over one of the logos before transitioning to the main ChatGPT GPTs page. The user selects the 'Creative Writing Coach' from 'Top Picks,' which the Man in Studio introduces as "really impressive," explaining that "you could paste some text that you wrote and get feedback to improve your creative writing skills." The Creative Writing Coach loads, presenting a prompt for feedback on a writing passage, and the user proceeds to type a detailed sci-fi story titled 'The Clockmaker of 2050' into the input field, describing a futuristic world with advanced technology and environmental collapse, and a character named Maya who discovers a time-traveling device, as the Man in Studio states, "I'm just going to say give me some feedback to improve this and I pasted this text from a science fiction thing that I've been writing." The screen remains on the input field, awaiting a response.
segments.visual_original_caption: The video begins with a screen recording of the ChatGPT GPTs Interface, where the Logo Creator GPT is displayed, showing nine distinct logo designs for 'Skill Leap AI' in a blue and grey color palette, accompanied by a message asking for user feedback. The scene transitions to a live shot of the Man in Studio, who is speaking directly to the camera in a dimly lit studio with blue ambient lighting, shelves of tech gadgets, and a microphone in front of him. He gestures expressively as he speaks. The video then cuts back to the screen recording, where the user interacts with the Logo Creator GPT, hovering over one of the logos. Next, the interface shifts to the main ChatGPT GPTs page, where the user selects the 'Creative Writing Coach' GPT from the 'Top Picks' list. The interface loads the Creative Writing Coach, which presents a prompt for feedback on a writing passage. The user types a detailed sci-fi story titled 'The Clockmaker of 2050' into the input field, describing a futuristic world with advanced technology and environmental collapse, and a character named Maya who discovers a time-traveling device. The story includes a character named Leo, a clockmaker from the 20th century, and ends with a prompt for feedback. The screen remains on the input field as the user awaits a response.

audio_updated_entities.Creative Writing Coach: A custom GPT within the ChatGPT GPTs Interface, identified by a blue circular icon with a stylized 'C', designed to provide feedback on creative writing and help improve writing skills, which the Man in Studio praises as "really impressive" and demonstrates by pasting a sci-fi story for feedback.

segments.integrated_caption: The video opens with a screen recording of the ChatGPT GPTs Interface, where a user is interacting with the 'Creative Writing Coach' GPT. The Man in Studio's voice explains that this GPT provides superior, tailored feedback for creative writing compared to standard ChatGPT, as the interface displays a detailed analysis of a science fiction story titled 'The Clockmaker of 2090', highlighting its strengths in premise, world-building, character, and theme. The user then navigates to the 'Explore GPTs' section and searches for 'convert anything', selecting the 'Convert Anything' GPT. The Man in Studio's voice introduces this GPT, noting its popularity with over 10,000 users and its ability to convert various file types like PNG to JPEG or WAV to MP3. A live shot shows the Man in Studio, wearing a black polo and gray baseball cap, gesturing as he elaborates on the GPT's functionality, explaining it leverages ChatGPT's code interpreter for seamless conversions. The screen recording reappears, showing the 'Convert Anything' interface. The user uploads a PNG image of an escalator, and the GPT processes it, generating a download link for the converted JPEG file. The Man in Studio's voice continues, demonstrating the conversion by stating, "convert this PNG to JPEG," as the video concludes with the successful conversion and download link displayed on screen.
segments.visual_original_caption: The video begins with a screen recording of the ChatGPT GPTs Interface, where a user is interacting with the 'Creative Writing Coach' GPT, receiving feedback on a science fiction story titled 'The Clockmaker of 2090'. The interface displays a detailed analysis of the story's strengths, including its intriguing premise, world-building, character development, and thematic depth. The user then navigates to the 'Explore GPTs' section and searches for 'convert anything', selecting the 'Convert Anything' GPT by Pietro Schirano. The scene transitions to a live shot of the Man in Studio, who speaks directly to the camera, gesturing with his hands as he explains the functionality of the 'Convert Anything' GPT. The video cuts back to the screen recording, showing the 'Convert Anything' interface with options to convert files like PDF to JPG or images to PNG. The user uploads a PNG file of an escalator image, and the GPT processes it, generating a download link for the converted JPEG file. The Man in Studio reappears, continuing his explanation, emphasizing the utility of the GPT for file conversion tasks. The video concludes with the screen recording showing the successful conversion and the download link being displayed.

audio_updated_entities.Convert Anything: A custom GPT within the ChatGPT GPTs Interface, identified by a circular icon with a document and arrow symbol, designed to convert various file types. The Man in Studio's voice describes it as having over 10,000 users, capable of converting files like PNG to JPEG or WAV to MP3, and utilizing ChatGPT's code interpreter for its functionality.

segments.integrated_caption: The video begins with a screen recording of the dark-themed ChatGPT GPTs Interface, where the 'Convert Anything' GPT is actively processing a file conversion request. The Man in Studio, speaking directly to the camera with expressive hand gestures, explains that he needs to convert a PNG file for a website, and the interface displays Python code for converting a PNG to JPEG, showing a 'Downloading...' status as the GPT uses a code interpreter in the background to write the conversion code, providing a direct link for the JPEG. The interface then transitions to the 'Diagrams: Show Me' GPT, which the Man in Studio introduces as having over 25,000 chats and being a former 'favorite plugin,' now a custom GPT, reflecting the platform's shift away from plugins. He explains its purpose: to create simple diagrams for visual learners or for teaching, showcasing examples of various diagram types including Mermaid and PlantUML sequence diagrams, mindmaps, and entity relationship diagrams. The screen recording returns, scrolling through these diagram examples, highlighting Mermaid and PlantUML mindmaps, Graphviz, and ErD entity relationship diagrams with clear labels and visual differences. The Man in Studio emphasizes its utility for mind maps, comparing it to his use of Freeform on Mac, but highlighting this as a quick AI solution, promising more examples. The interface maintains its dark theme with clear, labeled examples and a text input field at the bottom for user interaction.
segments.visual_original_caption: The video begins with a screen recording of the ChatGPT GPTs Interface, where the 'Convert Anything' GPT is actively processing a file conversion request, displaying Python code for converting a PNG to JPEG and showing a 'Downloading...' status. The interface then transitions to the 'Diagrams: Show Me' GPT, which presents examples of various diagram types including Mermaid and PlantUML sequence diagrams, mindmaps, and entity relationship diagrams. The Man in Studio appears in a live shot, speaking directly to the camera with expressive hand gestures, explaining the features of the GPTs. The screen recording returns, scrolling through the diagram examples, showcasing Mermaid and PlantUML mindmaps, Graphviz and ErD entity relationship diagrams, and highlighting the visual differences between them. audio_updated_entities.Diagrams: Show Me: A custom GPT within the ChatGPT GPTs Interface, identified by a circular icon with a diagram symbol, designed to generate and display various types of diagrams. The Man in Studio highlights that it has over 25,000 chats, was a 'favorite plugin,' and is now a custom GPT, designed to create simple diagrams for visual learners, useful for teaching, and particularly good for mind maps, offering a quick AI-powered alternative to other tools. It showcases examples of Mermaid and PlantUML sequence diagrams, mindmaps, and entity relationship diagrams, with clear visual representations and labels for each type.

segments.integrated_caption: The video opens with a screen recording of the dark-themed ChatGPT GPTs Interface, showcasing 'Top Picks' including Consensus and AI PDF. segments.integrated_caption: The video opens with the Man in Studio, visible in a circular overlay, explaining how a new ChatGPT GPT can create an entire video from a text prompt, similar to Invideo AI. He demonstrates this on the dark-themed ChatGPT GPTs Interface, searching for 'Invideo AI' and selecting the 'Video AI by Invideo' GPT. He types a request to 'create a YouTube video explaining generative AI to high school students'. The GPT responds with a 'Starting action' message, requests and receives permission to access his account, and then generates a clickable link for a video titled 'Understanding Generative AI: A Guide for High School Students'. The Man in Studio, continuing his clear, explanatory commentary, clicks the link, which transitions to the dark-themed Invideo AI Platform. He explains that while the link is provided, the video isn't fully made yet, requiring a login to Invideo AI, noting the free version includes a watermark. Having already logged in, he proceeds through the workspace selection, and the Invideo AI editor appears, displaying a preview of abstract AI-themed visuals with a 'Storyblocks' watermark and a timeline. The Man in Studio, now in a full-screen shot, uses expressive hand gestures to conclude, stating that the system will now generate the full video, which will be about three minutes long with various scenes.

segments.integrated_caption: The video opens with a close-up of the dark-themed ChatGPT GPTs Interface, displaying a search for 'canva' which reveals several related GPTs, including 'Canva' by canva.com. The Man in Studio, wearing a black polo shirt and gray baseball cap, speaks directly to the camera, explaining that while the Canva GPT allows "thousands of messages," it's "not quite there yet," primarily serving as a "way to find templates" and "links to Canva." He clarifies that he initially expected it to "generate all kinds of different designs" within ChatGPT, but it functions more as a "template tool or a template search tool," making it "worth a look at if you want to speed up the process of finding templates." He then states he "did not include it on the list" until it could truly create designs. The scene transitions to a title card introducing his "personal favorite," the 'Screenshot to Code GPT'. The interface for this GPT appears, prompting for a screenshot upload. The Man in Studio, now visible in a circular overlay, elaborates, suggesting one could take a screenshot of a website like Shopify's pricing page if they liked its layout. A screenshot of the Shopify pricing page is then uploaded, and the 'Screenshot to Code GPT' processes it, swiftly generating clean HTML, Tailwind, and JS code in the chat window. He emphasizes the simplicity, stating, "All I have to do is take a screenshot and come over here and I just have to upload that. I don't have to give it a single prompt," contrasting its ease with ChatGPT's vision capabilities, which he notes "never had a good time."
segments.visual_original_caption: The video begins with a close-up of the ChatGPT GPTs Interface, showing a search for 'canva' which returns several GPTs including 'Canva' by canva.com with over 100K users. The interface then shifts to a search for 'canva' within the GPTs platform, displaying a list of related GPTs. The Man in Studio reappears, continuing his explanation. The video then introduces a new GPT called 'Screenshot to Code GPT' with a title card. The interface for this GPT is shown, prompting the user to upload a screenshot. A screenshot of the Shopify pricing page is uploaded, and the GPT processes it, generating clean HTML, Tailwind, and JS code in the chat window. The Man in Studio is visible in a circular overlay throughout, providing commentary on the process.

It is shown processing a Shopify pricing page screenshot and outputting the corresponding code in the chat window, with the Man in Studio explaining its ability to generate code without a single prompt.

segments.integrated_caption: The video opens with the Man in Studio, wearing a black polo shirt and gray baseball cap, speaking directly to the camera with a clear, confident American accent and expressive hand gestures. He introduces the 'Screenshot to Code GPT', explaining how it successfully bypasses previous issues of partial code or errors encountered with other tools. The scene transitions to a screen recording of the dark-themed ChatGPT GPTs Interface, demonstrating the 'Screenshot to Code GPT'. A Shopify pricing page screenshot is uploaded, and the GPT efficiently processes it, generating clean HTML, Tailwind, and JS code, which is displayed in the chat window. The Man in Studio reappears, reinforcing the GPT's capabilities and explaining that this basic HTML and CSS code can be easily copied and pasted into website builders like Wix, Squarespace, or WordPress using their 'add custom code' function, eliminating the need to understand the code itself. A close-up shot of hands typing on a laptop keyboard, displaying code, further illustrates this process, with logos for Wix, WordPress, and another platform appearing to highlight the code's versatility. The ChatGPT interface then shows the complete generated code, including HTML structure, Tailwind classes, and a script tag. The Man in Studio emphasizes the tool's utility for anyone wanting to customize a website without coding knowledge. Finally, a live preview of the generated code renders the Shopify pricing cards on a webpage with accurate styling and layout, demonstrating the seamless conversion from screenshot to functional, customizable web content, as the Man in Studio concludes his remarks, noting that 'everything else, it got pretty...'.

The interface shows a dark theme with a prompt to upload a screenshot, and the user uploads an image of a Shopify pricing page. The GPT processes the image and generates clean HTML, Tailwind, and JS code, which is displayed in the chat window. The Man in Studio reappears, continuing his explanation with hand gestures, emphasizing the capabilities of the GPT. The video then cuts to a close-up of hands typing on a laptop keyboard, with the screen displaying code, and logos for Wix, WordPress, and another platform appear in the corner, suggesting the versatility of the generated code. The scene returns to the ChatGPT interface, showing the generated code for the Shopify page, including HTML structure, Tailwind classes, and a script tag. The Man in Studio appears again, reinforcing the utility of the tool. The video then shows a live preview of the generated code rendered on a webpage, displaying the Shopify pricing cards with accurate styling and layout. segments.integrated_caption: The video opens with the Man in Studio, wearing a black polo shirt and gray baseball cap, speaking directly to the camera from behind a microphone, gesturing expressively as he states, "Not bad without doing any actual coding." He then introduces, "And we just released our complete custom GPT course," as the scene transitions to a screen recording of the dark-themed SkillLeap AI course interface. The Man in Studio continues his clear and informative narration from a circular overlay in the top-left, explaining that the course, which contains "a little over 20 different videos," will take "custom GPTs to the next level." The interface displays a grid of course thumbnails, including 'COMPLETE CUSTOM GPT COURSE' and 'MASTERING DALL·E 3', each with a yellow banner. The view zooms into the detailed course outline for 'Custom GPTs For Entrepreneurs', showing sections like 'SECTION 1.1 INTRODUCTION TO GPTS' and 'SECTION 2.4 10 GPT ACTIONS WITH ZAPIER'. The cursor scrolls, highlighting sections such as 'SECTION 3.1 ADDING GPT WITH BOTPRESS P1' and 'SECTION 4.1 GPT STORE INTRODUCTION', as the speaker elaborates on automating GPTs using "Zapier actions" and adding them to websites with "Botpress," noting it uses "OpenAI API." The Man in Studio briefly reappears in a live shot, gesturing with his right hand, before the screen returns to the course interface, now showing the top of the 'Custom GPTs For Entrepreneurs' page with its description. He explains that the course is available when signing up for "SkillLeap AI," which provides access to "all these courses," including "course number 20," with "two to three new courses every single month" for "one subscription price with a free trial." The video cycles back to the grid of course thumbnails with the Man in Studio’s overlay, concluding with a 'Link In Description' text overlay.

The cursor scrolls through the outline, highlighting various sections, including 'SECTION 3.1 ADDING GPT WITH BOTPRESS P1', 'SECTION 4.1 GPT STORE INTRODUCTION', and 'SECTION 5.1 GPT COURSE WRAP UP'. entity_library.GPT Finder Configuration Page: A ChatGPT interface showing the 'GPT Finder' setup with uploaded PDF files under 'Knowledge', a 'Preview' section with sample prompts, and a 'Capabilities' section. The Man in Studio refers to this as "GPT Finder" while explaining that the GPTs presented are hand-picked and tested for usefulness.
entity_library.Doc Maker GPT Interface: A specialized ChatGPT interface for creating documents, presentations, and spreadsheets, featuring a blue document icon, a description of its capabilities (Document Creation, Presentations, Spreadsheets, Data Analysis), and a text input field for user prompts. The Man in Studio describes this GPT as a tool capable of creating PDFs, documents, and PowerPoints, emphasizing its utility for builders to clearly communicate its functions.
entity_library.Presentation Preview: A browser-based presentation editor displaying slides with titles like 'Introduction to Generative AI' and 'How Do Generative AI Work?', featuring a clean, modern design with blue and gray color accents, which the Man in Studio demonstrates can be edited, converted to audio, and downloaded as a PowerPoint.
entity_library.Super Describe GPT: A custom GPT within the ChatGPT GPTs Interface, identified by a red circular icon with a stylized 'S', designed to generate detailed image prompts from uploaded photos using DALL·E 3, as demonstrated by the Man in Studio uploading an architectural photo and receiving a detailed textual description.
entity_library.Prompt Perfect GPT: A custom GPT within the ChatGPT GPTs Interface, identified by a colorful circular icon with a stylized 'P', described by the Man in Studio as a tool designed to enhance and refine user prompts for AI image generation tools like DALL·E by adding necessary details and structure, making it ideal for new users.
entity_library.Logo Creator GPT: A custom GPT within the ChatGPT GPTs Interface, identified by a blue circular icon with a stylized 'L', designed to generate logo designs based on user preferences and company details, which the Man in Studio critiques for its text generation capabilities and offers usage advice for.
entity_library.Creative Writing Coach: A custom GPT within the ChatGPT GPTs Interface, identified by a blue circular icon with a stylized 'C', designed to provide feedback on creative writing and help improve writing skills. The Man in Studio's voice highlights its effectiveness in giving tailored feedback for creative writing.
entity_library.Convert Anything: A custom GPT within the ChatGPT GPTs Interface, identified by a circular icon with a document and arrow symbol, designed to convert various file types. It is shown handling a PNG to JPEG conversion, providing a download link upon completion, and displaying Python code for the conversion process, which the Man in Studio explains is generated by a 'code interpreter' working in the background.
entity_library.Diagrams: Show Me: A custom GPT within the ChatGPT GPTs Interface, identified by a circular icon with a diagram symbol, designed to generate and display various types of diagrams. The Man in Studio highlights that it has over 25,000 chats, was a 'favorite plugin,' and is now a custom GPT, designed to create simple diagrams for visual learners, useful for teaching, and particularly good for mind maps, offering a quick AI-powered alternative to other tools. It showcases examples of Mermaid and PlantUML sequence diagrams, mindmaps, and entity relationship diagrams, with clear visual representations and labels for each type.
entity_library.Invideo AI Platform: A dark-themed video creation platform with a central 'Idea to Video' section, featuring an astronaut graphic and options to 'Join with Google', 'Join with Apple', or 'Continue with email'. The platform displays a video generation progress bar, a workspace selection screen, and a video editor with a timeline, playback controls, and options like 'Edit', 'Export', and 'Generate'. The video preview shows abstract AI-themed visuals with a 'Storyblocks' watermark, which the Man in Studio explains is royalty-free stock footage used by the platform, and that the video is fully editable with options to remove the watermark via a paid subscription.
entity_library.Screenshot to Code GPT: A custom GPT within the ChatGPT GPTs Interface, identified by a circular icon with a stylized 'S' and 'C'. The Man in Studio highlights its ability to process a Shopify pricing page screenshot and output corresponding clean HTML, Tailwind, and JS code, which is then shown to be easily adaptable for website customization without requiring coding expertise.
entity_library.Laptop Typing Scene: A close-up shot of hands typing on a laptop keyboard, with the screen displaying code. The desk includes a coffee cup, a mouse, and a smartphone, with logos for Wix, WordPress, and another platform appearing in the corner, indicating the tool's compatibility with various platforms. The scene visually supports the Man in Studio's narration about copying and pasting the generated code.
entity_library.SkillLeap AI Course Interface: A dark-themed web interface for the SkillLeap AI platform, hosting online courses like 'Custom GPTs For Entrepreneurs'. It features a grid of course thumbnails with yellow banners and instructor images, and detailed section outlines with numbered sub-sections, including topics like Zapier actions, Botpress integration, and the GPT store. The interface, which the speaker notes contains over 20 videos and is part of a subscription offering monthly new courses, also displays navigation elements like 'Continue watching', 'Add to Favorites', and 'Share', along with a course description emphasizing personalized AI for business.
